newsSince: MATERIAL: multiple limit-ups (June 15, 16, 22) on genuine catalysts - SiC entering tier-1 automaker supply chains (Chongqing Sanan substrates feeding the ST JV), AI optical-chip ramp (400G/800G in volume shipment, 1.6T sampled to customers for validation), executive Lin Zhiqiang buying 1M shares June 12, plus >¥166m Q1 govt subsidies. This is fresh fundamental support, not pure flow.

sources.label: Sina - Sanan June 22 limit-up analysis (SiC + AI optical + insider buy)
Sina - Sanan June 16 limit-up (SiC + MiniLED + AI optical chip)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the CPO/compound-semis lens this is a clear fundamental shift since June 9: 800G optical chips in volume and 1.6T sampled to customers is direct CPO-adjacent alpha, plus SiC into tier-1 auto chains and insider buying. The 'single-bundle validation' flag eases. +3 and up vs watchlist peers; only +38% YTD leaves room.
verdicts.bull: 1.6T optical-chip sampling + 800G volume = direct CPO supply alpha; SiC into auto; insider buying.
verdicts.neutral: Multi-segment (LED/SiC/optical) dilutes pure CPO read; A-share flow amplifies.
verdicts.bear: Limit-ups partly momentum; govt-subsidy-dependent earnings; 1.6T still at validation stage.
